title: Guru Krupa Anajana
lyrics:
Guru Kripa..Anajana.. PAyao Mere Bhayei..
Guru KRipa..Anajana.. PAyao Mere Bhayei..
Rama Binakatchu dekatha naahi..
Rama Binakatchu dekatha naahi.. [Guru]
Anthar Rama..Bahar Rama..
Anthar Rama..Bahar Rama..
Jagaatnthe kevaha puranhi kama…[Guru]
Jakratha Rama..Shovathu Rama..
Sapaname Dhekathu Rajahi Rama..
Khehathi kabira..kabira..kabira..kabir..
Khehathi kabira..Anubhava neeka..
JAganthe kevahe rama sathika [Guru]
Sadhguru pahimam.. parama dhayalao rakshamam..
